about.title: The Cohamy Story
about.subtitle: From our factory to your hands
about.description: Cohamy was founded with a mission to deliver premium chocolate products, combining cashews, almonds, and natural Vietnamese ingredients. Every piece reflects artisan craftsmanship and strict quality standards.

quality.title: Selected Ingredients
quality.description: Binh Phuoc cashews, almonds, and cacao carefully sourced from trusted suppliers.

craft.title: Exclusive Recipes
craft.description: Modern production combined with time-honored techniques for a distinctive, unmatched taste.

natural.title: Natural & Safe
natural.description: No preservatives, no additives — perfect for families and premium gifting.

gift.title: Elegant Gifting
gift.description: Luxurious packaging ideal for holidays, birthdays, and corporate events.

step1.title: Ingredient Selection

step2.title: Coating & Crafting
step2.description: Smooth chocolate coating with our signature recipe, preserving natural nut flavors.

step3.title: Quality Inspection
step3.description: Every batch undergoes rigorous testing before packaging.

step4.title: Packaging & Delivery
step4.description: Moisture-resistant packaging ensures chocolate arrives in perfect condition.

review1.text: Cohamy chocolate is smooth and the cashew flavor is wonderful. I bought it as a gift and received so many compliments!
review1.author: Lan Nguyen

review2.text: The matcha and durian flavors are so unique — truly Vietnamese. I'll definitely keep supporting Cohamy!
review2.author: Minh Tuan Tran

review3.text: Beautiful packaging and consistent quality. Our company ordered corporate gifts and was very satisfied.
review3.author: Phuong Anh Le

q1.question: What is the shelf life of Cohamy chocolate?
q1.answer: 55g pouches typically last 12 months; 160g glass jars about 10–12 months from production. The date printed on packaging is the most accurate reference.

q2.question: How should I store nut chocolate?
q2.answer: Keep in a cool, dry place below 25°C and away from direct sunlight. After opening, reseal the pouch or jar to preserve crunch.

q3.question: Does the product contain allergens?
q3.answer: Products contain nuts (almonds, cashews, macadamia), milk, soy, and may contain gluten from stabilizers. Check the ingredients on packaging or contact us for details.

q4.question: Do you support bulk orders and corporate gifts?
q4.answer: Cohamy offers holiday combos, event gifting, and custom logo printing. Contact hotline/Zalo 0981 956 111 or email Cohamyvietnam@gmail.com for a quote.
